justification: The diff correctly migrates all javax.* imports to jakarta.* and updates dependencies (Spring Boot 3, Hibernate 6, Jakarta EE APIs) to match Java 21 requirements. However, it does not leverage any Java 21-specific language features (e.g., records, pattern matching, virtual threads), so idiomatic_java21 is 4 instead of 5. The migration is clean with no spurious churn.
